summary: Founder Dashboard feature testing complete. All 8 sections implemented and working correctly. Backend API returns 200 with all required data. Frontend displays all sections with proper data-testid attributes. Navigation links (View All, View Funnel) work correctly. Refresh button updates dashboard data.
passed_tests: GET /api/founder/dashboard returns 200
Dashboard has all 8 required sections (summary, cash_position, receivable_pipeline, upcoming_payments, todays_activity, ongoing_projects, profitability, pending_approvals, sales_pipeline)
Summary section has correct structure (cash_available, receivables, payables, net_position, today_net, active_projects, pending_approvals)
Cash Position section shows total, accounts list, and by_type breakdown (cash, bank, digital)
Receivable Pipeline shows total_receivable, projects_with_dues, and details with project info
Upcoming Payments shows total_payable, expense_requests, vendor_payables, salary_payable, other_liabilities
Today's Activity shows receipts, expenses, net_movement, transaction_count
Ongoing Projects shows project list with progress, contract_value, total_received, actual_cost, profit_loss, profit_margin
Profitability shows total_projects, profitable_projects, loss_making_projects, total_profit, total_loss, net_profit, top_profitable, top_loss_making
Pending Approvals shows total_count, expense_requests, vendor_payments with items
Sales Pipeline shows total_leads, new_leads_30d, hot_leads, recent_conversions, by_status
Unauthenticated access returns 401

Supporting endpoints work: /api/finance/safe-spend, /api/finance/alerts, /api/finance/expense-requests/stats/summary, /api/finance/safe-use-summary, /api/finance/liabilities/summary, /api/finance/revenue-reality-check
Frontend: Founder Dashboard page loads at /finance/founder-dashboard

Frontend: All 8 data-testid attributes present (founder-dashboard, cash-position-section, receivables-section, upcoming-payments-section, todays-activity-section, ongoing-projects-section, profitability-section, pending-approvals-section, sales-pipeline-section)
Frontend: Health status card displays correctly (Healthy/Warning/Critical)
Frontend: Safe spend card shows YES/NO with daily safe limit
Frontend: Refresh button works and updates timestamp
Frontend: View All button in Ongoing Projects navigates to /finance/project-finance
Frontend: View Funnel button in Sales Pipeline is present
Frontend: Lead Status Breakdown badges display correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 required sections are implemented with proper data-testid attributes
API endpoint /api/founder/dashboard returns comprehensive data structure
Frontend correctly consumes and displays all dashboard data
Currency formatting uses INR format with proper locale
Progress bars and color coding work correctly for profit/loss indicators
context_for_next_testing_agent: Founder Dashboard fully tested. All 8 sections working: Cash Position (₹10,70,159 total), Receivable Pipeline (₹5,00,000 pending), Upcoming Payments (₹2,07,888 due), Today's Activity (3 transactions), Ongoing Projects (1 active), Profitability (-₹32,777 net), Pending Approvals (0 pending), Sales Pipeline (51 leads, 22 hot).
